creator: sanpei@yy.cs.keio.ac.jp
text:
This port is
    	    wdiff 
	    ``display word differences between text files.''

	Example:
		text-a
			I like FreeBSD.
		text-b
			I love FreeBSD.

		% wdiff -n text-a text-b
		I [-like-] {+love+} FreeBSD.

	Category in textproc.

	I put tarball to
        ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/wdiff.tar.gz

Thank you.
